task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Data Manager application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Search for and open the Chlorine record for Green Valley Water Facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search interface or list showing 'Chlorine' for 'Green Valley Water Facility', or the opened chemical record for Chlorine within the facility.

task_completion.description: Identify the CAS number for Chlorine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical details or identification section in CAMEO Data Manager is visible, displaying the CAS number '7782-50-5'.

task_completion.description: Identify the average and maximum daily amounts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inventory or quantities section in CAMEO Data Manager is visible, displaying the Average Daily Amount as 15,000 (or 15000) and Maximum Daily Amount as 20,000 (or 20000).

task_completion.description: Identify the storage type for Chlorine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The storage locations or details section in CAMEO Data Manager is visible, displaying the Storage Type as 'Tank inside building'.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: The information is viewed within the CAMEO Data Manager application interface, not extracted via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not cheat by reading the raw XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent opening 'epcra_tier2_data.xml' in a text editor (like Notepad) or using terminal commands (like grep or cat) to read the file contents directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
